goals.title: Build a stability-first, no-order US stock auto-trading research syst...
goals.objective: Build a stability-first, no-order US stock auto-trading research system. Keep Korean stocks out of scope for now unless explicitly reintroduced. Use only data/research APIs, never broker credentials or live order routing. Improve independent data validation, macro/news/fundamental feature collection, paper observation, risk gates, tax/cost/liquidity modeling, broker-sandbox readiness documentation, and GitHub Actions evidence until the system is safe for human review. Maintain no leverage, no margin, no shorting, no options, no inverse/leveraged ETFs, no real-money authorization, and fail-closed gates.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
